kept.text:
@azatack1 @myounis9981 @Nga_Di2609 hey! let’s dive into $AIOT #AIOTUSDT on the 1h chart for you 🚀

- expecting price to RISE in the short term, bullish bias as long as 0.104183 holds
- first target is the resistance zone at 0.110889, then aiming for 0.118091 and 0.124628 next
- potential long entry if price retests the 0.104183–0.101447 demand area and shows bullish confirmation (pin bar, strong bullish engulfing, or LTF reversal)
- take profit at 0.110889, partial at 0.118091, leave a runner for 0.124628 if momentum continues
- if price closes below 0.101447 with strong bearish candle, bias flips short and I’d look for a move toward 0.099580 and possibly 0.092624
- confirmation: watch for rejection wicks or bullish SMC entry triggers on the retest of support, avoid entry if price consolidates weakly or fails to reclaim above 0.104183

not investment advice, educational report only
